data.content: Revised plan v2 addresses both review concerns: (1) Section-level "Add Selected" button replaces per-row Add and Add All — collects all multi-selected models across agents, imports in one action, uses variant="success" styling. (2) Codex rename scope is explicit: AgentProviderId type, PROVIDER_LABELS, detectAgentProviderId return value, normalizeAgentIdentity/normalizeCopilotModel/formatAgentFamily guards, VENDOR_CONFIG key in agent-info-bar.tsx, and agent-identity tests. Lease-audit test data left unchanged (raw stored strings, not type-level). State shape changes from Record<string,string> to Record<string,string[]>. Multi-select uses unified Popover+Command combobox replacing both Select and SearchableOptionCombobox paths. Execution: identity rename → hooks state shape → scanned UI → section wiring → quality gates.
